description:
This quiz evaluates intermediate-to-advanced proficiency in AWS storage and database services, emphasizing practical best practices and troubleshooting tricky edge cases. Delivered with a playful, encouraging, and informal tone, it aims to reinforce hands-on cloud expertise through scenario-based challenges.
Topics: AWS S3, DynamoDB, Aurora, RDS, ElastiCache, Cloud Storage Best Practices
Audience: Cloud engineers, backend developers, and AWS certification candidates
